message:
🧹 Remove unused type exports: ShapeType, AccessibleStatusConfig, ClassifiedError, KubaraChartEntry (#10221)

Reduce public API surface. These types are used only internally and have zero external importers.

Fixes #10219

Signed-off-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
